title: Add Famous quotes to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Famous quotes](https://juanrivera126.github.io/Famous-quotes/) to image
- A web application that generates artistic posters with famous quotes, using the [Pollinations](https://pollinations.ai/) APIs. Users can specify an author or receive a random quote. The application us

Fixes #9990

gist.headline: Picture Perfect Quotes
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed in the greenhouse! 'Famous Quotes' turns words of wisdom into beautiful AI-generated posters.
gist.summary: Added 'Famous Quotes' by juanrivera126 to the community showcase, a web app that generates artistic posters from specific or random quotes using the Pollinations API.
gist.impact: Users can now explore and draw inspiration from this new community project that beautifully combines text generation and image synthesis.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot in a cozy art studio, admiring a freshly generated poster on an easel. Represents the creation of artistic quote posters.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, admiring a beautiful framed poster on a wooden easel. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a glowing quill pen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, admiring a beautiful framed poster on a wooden easel. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a glowing quill pen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background.
